component: Identity, abstract, provenance, three-/four-strand scope, variability causes, introduction, and opening conditioning method

component: Sampling and model-accuracy caution, individual dispersion, tolerance construction, and numerical ranges
rationale: Retain the invalid random-sampling interpretation, individual-versus-mean distinction, and assumptions; exclude formulas, coverage values, rounding recipe, and range outputs.

rationale: Source graphs, points, axes, fitted values, and tolerance outputs are excluded pending component audit and to prevent operational reuse.
